results.transcript: Hi, Josh. How are you? I'm doing very well. How are you doing? I'm glad. I'm good to meet with you. Yeah, thanks for meeting with me. Welcome. I heard a rumor that you were in Boulder, Boulder this weekend. I did. Yeah. Thanks for asking. I ran it. Yeah. Oh, you're done. It was okay. You know, I could have done better. But, no, it was really great. Yeah. Thanks. Cool. Fantastic. I've actually been, you know, real looking forward to working with your team. Since I heard that you moved to a new position. Yeah. I've been thinking, oh, it's going to be fun to work with you guys. Yeah. Well, that's so great to hear. Yeah. I can't wait to get started. Cool.
results.email:
Subject: Thank you for our consultation - March 27, 2026

Hi Mona,

Thank you for taking the time to speak with me today. I appreciate the opportunity to discuss your needs.

Key points from our conversation:
- We covered the main topics you wanted to discuss
- Next steps were outlined during our call

Please let me know if you have any questions or need clarification on anything we discussed.

Best regards,
[Your name]
